Name: Fur Blur
Description: Applies a directional blur to fur or hair rendering to simulate strand softness and reduce aliasing artifacts. Typically used in shell or card-based fur systems to improve visual density and realism.

Fields.Name: Enable Fur Blur
Fields.Description: Enables or disables the fur blur effect. When disabled, fur strands remain sharp and unfiltered.

Fields.Name: Fur Blur Intensity
Fields.Description: Controls overall strength of the blur applied to fur strands. Higher values increase softness and reduce visible strand separation.

Fields.Name: Blur Max Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum distance over which fur pixels are sampled and blurred. Higher values create longer, more diffuse strand blending.

Fields.Name: Sample Count
Fields.Description: Number of samples taken along the blur direction. Higher values improve quality but increase performance cost.

Fields.Name: Blur Pass Count
Fields.Description: Number of iterative blur passes applied. Higher values simulate stronger diffusion and volumetric softness in fur shading.
